title: Luffy Protects His Crew
description: The crew lands on a strange island of stretched animals and meets Tonjit before the Foxy Pirates interrupt the calm.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this scene focuses on Luffy, Narrator, Foxy, Nami, Usopp. The crew lands on a strange island of stretched animals and meets Tonjit before the Foxy Pirates interrupt the calm.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That sounds great! Let's do it!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Uhh, no, leave that one out.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Don't just tell me he's not here!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: He's probably gone off sight- seeing again,

summary: The crew lands on a strange island of stretched animals and meets Tonjit before the Foxy Pirates interrupt the calm.
